title: codereview-pass2: missing dedicated subsections 18.11 /deaddrop and 18.12 /confessions with payload examples, security (OSCORE E2E for deaddrop), privacy (no-log for confessions), DTN specifics
description: The table edit is a good start but per spec style for other apps, full subsections with CBOR/SenML examples, rate limit table, e-ink flow diagram, test vector link are REQUIRED. Fix before closing parent.
